history.title: When Did Redd Foxx Die?
history.description: "Home Biographies When Did Redd Foxx Die? When Did Redd Foxx Die? Redd Foxx was born in 1922 and died in 1991. He was a great comedian and entertainer. He died on a set, doing what he loved to do, making people laugh. When Redd Foxx Died Redd and friend Della Reese co-starred in a movie called, ""Ha
